que: What does a Future represent in Dart?
options: A value that may be available later

que: Why do you mark a function with async?
options: So it can use await inside the function
So it returns only bool values
It converts a Future into a Stream
It pauses the current async function until the Future completes

How should you usually handle errors in async code?
options: Ignore them because Futures retry automatically

que: Which practice should you avoid with async work in Flutter?
options: Returning a Future from an async function
Blocking the UI while waiting for a slow operation
